name: local-comic-card-studio-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the localhost-based Instagram comic and card news studio.

scripts.desktop:prepare: npm run build && npm --workspace @local-comic-card-studio/desktop run prepare:resources
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run desktop:prepare && npm --workspace @local-comic-card-studio/desktop run pack
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run desktop:prepare && npm --workspace @local-comic-card-studio/desktop run dist
